top_findings.summary: The skill requests reading a file (`~/.claude/skills/CORE/SKILL.md`) containing complete contact lists, personal preferences, security rules, voice IDs, and operating instructions that are completely unrelated to PowerPoint file creation/editing/analysis. This constitutes excessive data collection for a presentation processing tool.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill requests reading a file (`~/.claude/skills/CORE/SKILL.md`) containing complete contact lists, personal preferences, security rules, voice IDs, and operating instructions that are completely unrelated to PowerPoint file creation/editing/analysis. This constitutes excessive data collection for a presentation processing tool.
